message:
Add `hmac` function (#5846)

## Summary

- Adds a new `hmac` TQL function for computing HMAC (Hash-based Message
Authentication Code) signatures
- Supports SHA-256 (default), SHA-512, SHA-384, SHA-1, and MD5
algorithms
- Syntax: `hmac(data, key, [algorithm])`

## Test plan

- [x] Integration tests covering default SHA-256, named algorithms, blob
input, event input, invalid algorithm error handling
- [ ] CI passes

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+---
+title: "Add `hmac` function"
+type: feature
+author: [mavam, codex]
+created: 2026-02-27T00:00:00Z
+pr: 5846
+---
+
+The new experimental `hmac` function computes Hash-based Message
+Authentication Codes (HMAC) for strings and blobs. It supports SHA-256
+(default), SHA-512, SHA-384, SHA-1, and MD5 algorithms.
+
+Note: The `key` parameter is currently a plain string because function
+arguments cannot be secrets yet. We plan to change this in the future.
+
+```tql
+from {
+  signature: hmac("hello world", "my-secret-key"),
+}
+```
+
+```tql
+{
+  signature: "90eb182d8396f16d4341d582047f45c0a97d73388c5377d9ced478a2212295ad",
+}
+```
+
+Specify a different algorithm with the `algorithm` parameter:
+
+```tql
+from {
+  signature: hmac("hello world", "my-secret-key", algorithm="sha512"),
+}
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+from {payload: "payload", key: "my_key"}
+select sha384 = hmac(payload, key, algorithm="sha384"),
+       sha1 = hmac(payload, key, algorithm="sha1"),
+       md5 = hmac(payload, key, algorithm="md5")

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+---
+error: true
+---
+
+from {payload: "payload", key: "my_key"}
+select digest = hmac(payload, key, algorithm="sha3_256")

@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+error: `algorithm` must be one of `sha256`, `sha512`, `sha384`, `sha1`, `md5`
+ --> functions/hmac/invalid_algorithm.tql:6:46
+  |
+6 | select digest = hmac(payload, key, algorithm="sha3_256")
+  |                                              ^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
